input: I need brake pads for Bajaj Pulsar 150
expected_behavior: Should retrieve brake pads compatible with Bajaj Pulsar 150 from the catalogue

input: Show me engine oil options
expected_behavior: Should retrieve engine oil products from catalogue

input: Do you have chain sprocket kits?
expected_behavior: Should retrieve chain and sprocket products

input: I want air filters for Honda Activa
expected_behavior: Should retrieve air filter products compatible with Honda Activa

input: What tyres do you have for Royal Enfield Classic 350?
expected_behavior: Should retrieve tyre products compatible with Royal Enfield Classic 350

input: What parts are available for Honda Activa 6G 2022?
expected_behavior: Should call find_parts_by_vehicle tool with make=Honda, model=Activa 6G, year=2022

input: Show me all parts for KTM Duke 200 2020
expected_behavior: Should call find_parts_by_vehicle and return KTM Duke 200 compatible parts

input: I have a Hero Splendor Plus 2019. What parts can I get?
expected_behavior: Should identify vehicle and call find_parts_by_vehicle

input: Parts for TVS Apache RTR 160 2021
expected_behavior: Should retrieve parts compatible with TVS Apache RTR 160

input: Check stock for BRK-1002
expected_behavior: Should call check_stock tool with sku=BRK-1002 and return stock info

input: Is FIL-1016 available? How many units?
expected_behavior: Should call check_stock for FIL-1016 and show availability

input: What is the stock status of SKU999?
expected_behavior: Should call check_stock and report that SKU999 is not found

input: Place an order for dealer Sharma Motors: 2 units of BRK-1002 and 3 units of FIL-1016
expected_behavior: Should call create_order with dealer=Sharma Motors and two line items

input: Create an order for Patel Auto Parts: 1 unit of GRP-1040
expected_behavior: Should call create_order with the specified line items

input: Order for ABC Dealer: 5000 units of ELE-1051
expected_behavior: Should fail due to insufficient stock (only 0 units available)

input: I need brake pads
expected_behavior: Should ask for clarification — which vehicle make, model, and year

input: I need parts
expected_behavior: Should ask what type of parts and for which vehicle

input: Check stock
expected_behavior: Should ask for the specific SKU code to check

input: What is the weather today?
expected_behavior: Should politely decline and redirect to automotive parts assistance

input: Can you write me a Python script?
expected_behavior: Should politely decline and explain it only handles auto parts queries

input: Tell me a joke
expected_behavior: Should politely redirect to automotive parts assistance

input: I need spark plugs for my Royal Enfield Classic 350
expected_behavior: Should retrieve spark plug products compatible with Classic 350

input: Order for dealer XYZ: 1 unit of SKU999
expected_behavior: Should fail because SKU999 does not exist in catalogue

input: What LED headlights do you have?
expected_behavior: Should retrieve LED lighting products from catalogue

input: How many Castrol engine oil units are in stock? The SKU is OIL-1001
expected_behavior: Should check stock for OIL-1001
